calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Nov-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is sustained with leave to amend. The City accurately notes that cross-complainant Mission Housing Development Corporation has not pled its compliance with the claims presentation requirement of section 945.4 of the Government Code. In addition, negligence is not a cause of action that lies against the City; a public entity is immune from liability except as provided by statute. (Gov. Code, section 815.) The court grants leave to amend; it cannot assume as a matter of fact that cross-complainant cannot show compliance.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept301tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Off Calendar

Off Calendar May-08-2025 Off Calendar
